name: Advantage and Disadvantage
rules_text: Roll two d20s and use the higher result for Advantage or the lower result for Disadvantage. They do not stack.

name: Poisoned
rules_text: A Poisoned creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

name: Magic Missile
rules_text: Create three darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature you can see within range and deals force damage.

name: Light
rules_text: Touch one Large or smaller object. It sheds bright and dim light for the duration.

name: Longsword
rules_text: Martial melee weapon. Deals slashing damage and has the Versatile property.

name: Shield
rules_text: While equipped, a shield grants a bonus to Armor Class.

name: Arcane Recovery
rules_text: Recover expended spell slots after finishing a Short Rest, subject to the feature's level-based limit.

name: Concentration
rules_text: You can concentrate on only one effect at a time. Damage may require a Constitution saving throw to maintain it.
